group_name.description: The name of the availability zone group.

id.description: The unique identifier for the availability zone.

name.description: The name of the availability zone.

name_suffix.description: The suffix of the availability zone name.

network_border_group.description: The network border group of the availability zone.

opt_in_status.description: The opt-in status of the availability zone.

parent_zone_id.description: The ID of the parent availability zone, if applicable.

parent_zone_name.description: The name of the parent availability zone, if applicable.

region.description: The AWS region in which the availability zone is located.

state.description: The state of the availability zone (e.g., available).

zone_id.description: The ID of the availability zone.

zone_type.description: The type of the availability zone (e.g., local, regional).
